title: Team & Enterprise Collaboration
description: Add features that enable teams to standardize developer environments across organizations, including shared configuration templates, configuration inheritance with recursive extending, and automatic tool updates
acceptance_criteria: extends field accepts URL or local path
Multiple inheritance with array syntax works
Recursive extending resolves depth-first, left-to-right
Diamond dependencies handled correctly (load once, apply once)
Deep merge of tool sections (child overrides parent)
Hook merging appends (both parent and child run, parent first)
Circular dependency detection with clear error message
Maximum depth enforcement (10 levels)
jarvy config show --resolved displays merged config
jarvy config show --extends-chain shows inheritance tree
Cache for remote configs with configurable TTL
Graceful fallback when remote unavailable (use stale cache)
jarvy team add registers config source
jarvy team list shows registered sources
jarvy team browse discovers available configs via index.toml
jarvy update checks for newer versions of installed tools
jarvy update --all updates all outdated tools
jarvy update <tool> updates specific tool
Auto-update configuration in jarvy.toml or global config
Update notifications on setup when newer versions available

tasks.title: Create team module structure
tasks.description: Set up the module structure for team collaboration features

tasks.title: Add extends field to Config
tasks.description: Extend the Config struct to support the extends field
subtasks: Add extends field to Config struct
Support both string and array syntax via serde

tasks.title: Implement ConfigCache
tasks.description: Create caching layer for remote configs
subtasks: Create ConfigCache struct with cache_dir and ttl
Implement set() with TOML validation before caching
Use SHA256 hash of URL as cache key

tasks.title: Implement InheritanceResolver
tasks.description: Core recursive config resolution with depth-first traversal
subtasks: Add in_progress HashSet for cycle detection
Add resolved_cache HashMap for diamond dependency handling
Implement resolve() with depth-first, left-to-right traversal
Create ResolutionTrace struct for inheritance chain tracking

tasks.title: Implement config merging
tasks.description: Deep merge logic for all config sections
subtasks: Implement merge_tools() - deep merge, overlay wins
Implement merge_env() - deep merge for vars and secrets

tasks.title: Implement inheritance error handling
tasks.description: Comprehensive error types and messages for inheritance

tasks.title: Implement remote config loading
tasks.description: Fetch configs from URLs with caching
subtasks: Transform GitHub URLs to raw content URLs
